Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At this time, of rains past and leaves verdant, a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At this time, of summer suns and vibrant festivals, a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At this time, of autumn and its bountiful rice harvests, a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}While autumn has finally gifted us with pleasant weather, a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Early sunsets herald the advent of winter (as does the calendar), and a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It is now December, the busiest season of the year, and a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Though the new year steadily approaches, a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}At the dawn of the new year, when one eases into a new beginning, a human presence can be found within Tartarus... albeit a weakening one.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it best for you to hurry if you wish to save them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The deadline for a request you accepted a while ago is fast approaching. If you wish to complete it, I believe it best for you to take action soon.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greed is such a terrible sin. Alas, I cannot help but want, and now the number of requests I have for you has increased.[n]{f 1 5 0}I would be incredibly pleased should you spare the time to fulfill them.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sincerely yours, forevermore,[n]Elizabeth[n]{f 1 1}
